name: Marvelous Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 package Frozen chopped spinach (thawed and squeezed dry)
Sauteed in red wine (open a nice bottle and drink the rest)
1 cup Fat-free cottage cheese (or drier type of cottage cheese)
4 Cloves garlic sauteed with the rest of the ingredients
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the six noodles in a bowl.
2. Fill each manicotti shell with the mixture; you may have some leftover.
3. Place the shells in a baking dish and cover with one jar of Healthy Choice fat-free spaghetti sauce.
4. Bake at 400°F for about 45 minutes.
